name: Christmas Oyster Soup (Soupe Aux Huitres De Noel)
recipeIngredient: 2 medium carrots, peeled and grated into long, thin shreds
4 cups milk or 2 cups milk with 1 cup cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the carrots into long, thin shreds.
2. Add the finely diced celery to a saucepan.
3. Melt the butter in the saucepan and add the vegetables.
4. Stir until well combined.
5. Cover and simmer over very low heat for 20 minutes, ensuring the vegetables do not brown.
6. Add the milk (or the mixture of milk and cream) and bring to a boil.
7. Heat the oysters in an enamelled cast iron pan over medium heat; do not boil.
8. Pour the heated oysters into the milk and serve immediately.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
The soup should be served as soon as it is ready, otherwise, it may curdle. The milk and vegetables can be prepared ahead of time, while the oysters should be heated and served at the last minute.
